title: Revision of Retail Supply Tariff for FY 2026-27
summary: KERC has approved the revision of electricity tariffs for all ESCOMs including BESCOM, with an average increase of 30 paise per unit. Fixed charges have been increased by ₹10 per kW.
aiSummary: The electricity rates have gone up slightly starting this April. You will pay ₹10 more per month for your meter's fixed charge, and about 30 paise more for every unit of electricity you use.
citizenImpact: Expect your monthly bill to increase by ₹30 to ₹60 on average.

title: Scheduled Power Outage in Jayanagar Subdivision
summary: Quarterly maintenance of the 66kV substation at Jayanagar will result in power interruptions between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM on July 25th.
aiSummary: If you live in Jayanagar or JP Nagar, there will be no power on July 25th from 10 AM to 4 PM due to maintenance.
citizenImpact: Plan your work accordingly. Water pumps and lifts will not operate during these hours.

title: Online Transfer of Electricity Connection (e-Katha Owner Name Change)
summary: BESCOM has digitized the connection transfer process on bescom.co.in. Property buyers can now submit electricity meter name change applications online in 2-3 steps using BBMP e-Katha.
aiSummary: Bought a new home or property? You can now transfer the BESCOM connection to your name completely online via bescom.co.in using your BBMP e-Katha.
citizenImpact: No need to visit BESCOM office or pay middlemen. Process completed online with updated name on next bill.
